title: Xtra Hearty Australian Chicken Biryani
description: A flavorful and nutritious Australian dish featuring basmati rice, chicken, and earthy spices, perfect for a hangover cure or a hearty meal. This low-glycemic-friendly recipe is made with wholesome ingredients and cooked to perfection using the dum method.
instructions: Heat the ghee in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the cumin seeds and let them sizzle for a few seconds.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the grated carrot and chopped zucchini and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the chicken breast pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the coriander powder, turmeric powder, and salt, and stir well.
Add the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a boil.
Add the basmati rice and stir well to combine.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the saucepan with a tight-fitting lid, and cook using the dum method for 20 minutes.
Turn off the heat and let the biryani rest for 5 minutes before serving.
